name: Mistral Large 24.11
license: Mistral Research License (non-commercial; commercial license required for production)
note: Nov 2024 refresh of Large 2 with improved long-context handling, function calling and system prompt support.
tpsNote: 123B model exceeds a single RTX 4090's 24GB VRAM even at Q4; requires multi-GPU or CPU offload.

results.notes: From the HF 'Evaluation results' auto-generated widget, backed by the community EvalEval automated eval-results datastore - an automated third-party eval run, not a Mistral self-report.

verificationNotes: Real release confirmed via HF model card (fetched): 123B params, 'mrl' (Mistral Research License) confirmed, 128k context confirmed.
